name: nxcurl
description: HTTP CLI for humans and agents: history, envs {{VAR}}, HAR/Postman import, --json for LLMs.
agent_usage: Use `nxcurl run <url> [--json]` for structured status/headers/body. History: `nxcurl history list --json`. After install run `nxcurl catalog` and point agents at ~/.nxcurl/catalog/tools.json or merge into your tars tools.md. Substitute secrets with `-e <env>` and {{KEY}} in URL/headers/body.
